description: A2A Plane source-public approval rehearsal schema. Deterministic, no-live approval packet evaluation before any source-public execution. The rehearsal may produce GO_CANDIDATE, NO_GO, or NEEDS_OPERATOR_APPROVAL, but it never performs approval, release, visibility, provider-send, deploy, restart, terminal ACK, or database mutation actions.

gates.title: Deterministic approval packet
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Approval packet is missing, nondeterministic, lacks a packetId/manifestDigest, or does not identify exactly what a later operator-approved source-public execution would run.
evidence: Deterministic packetId and manifestDigest are present.
Packet lists the exact candidate repos/actions and explicitly labels execution as not performed.
Packet separates approval review from approval execution.

gates.title: Integrated evidence bundle
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Integrated broker/plugin/runner/libero evidence bundle is absent, stale, or lacks a stable manifest digest.
evidence: Bundle has a stable manifestDigest and redacted links for broker, plugin, runner, and libero evidence.
Bundle excludes raw source history, raw session dumps, secrets, provider targets, and host-private paths.

gates.title: No-live Terminal Brief rehearsal
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Terminal Brief rehearsal is missing or indicates live provider sends, terminal ACKs, operator-visible receipt inference, or terminal-outbox mutation.
evidence: Terminal Brief output is rehearsal/no-live only.
Provider message ids, send success, accepted-send, and queued states are labeled non-ACK evidence only.
No terminal ACK or terminal-outbox ACK is performed.

gates.title: Replay/no-duplicate proof
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Replay proof is missing, lacks stable idempotency keys, or allows duplicate approval packets, duplicate Terminal Brief markers, or duplicate live sends.
evidence: Replay attempted at least twice with the same dedupe/idempotency key.
Replay returns the same packetId/manifestDigest and creates zero duplicate terminal markers or provider sends.
Manifest mismatch is classified as NO_GO rather than silently reusing approval state.

gates.title: Rollback and abort paths
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Rollback/abort plan is missing or does not prove a safe stop before any source-public execution.
evidence: Abort path stops before visibility/release/provider/deploy/DB/ACK effects.
Rollback path names the manual operator steps needed if a later separately approved execution fails.
No automatic merge, release, visibility change, or approval execution is included.

gates.title: Scanner/history readiness
gates.blockedWhenMissing: External scanner/history evidence is missing, stale, or not explicitly dispositioned.
evidence: At least one supported secret/history scanner result is linked by redacted metadata.
Findings are clean or explicitly dispositioned without publishing matched secret values.

gates.title: OpenClaw runtime/bootstrap hygiene
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Runtime/bootstrap context paths would enter a branch, PR text, issue comment, or artifact evidence.
evidence: Branch diff and artifact evidence exclude AGENTS.md, SOUL.md, USER.md, TOOLS.md, HEARTBEAT.md, IDENTITY.md, and .openclaw/**.
Block output reports exact repo-relative offending paths if any are detected.

gates.title: Redacted evidence policy
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Evidence includes raw secrets, raw session dumps, provider targets, host-private paths, or private source snippets.
evidence: Evidence contains issue/PR URLs, commands, statuses, counts, hashes, and redacted artifact references only.
No credentials, provider identifiers, chat IDs, raw logs, raw session dumps, or host-private paths are pasted.

gates.title: Separate explicit operator approval
gates.blockedWhenMissing: All rehearsal gates may be complete, but source-public execution still needs a later explicit operator approval. Without it the decision is NEEDS_OPERATOR_APPROVAL, not GO_CANDIDATE.
evidence: Approval evidence, if present, is separate from scanner/tests/Start/PR/Done/Block evidence and names the source-public action explicitly.
This rehearsal never executes that approval.
